headline: EMEA Non-Alcoholic Beverages Sponsorship in Sports Business Report 2025 Featuring Coca-Cola, Lavazza, Monster Energy, PepsiCo, and Red Bull
summary: The EMEA non-alcoholic beverage sector sees growth opportunities in sports sponsorship, with soccer dominating due to vast audience reach. Energy drinks lead in high-value deals by aligning with youth and high-performance lifestyles. Companies prioritize strategic partnerships, with Europe as the region's main driver.Dublin, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Sponsorship Sector Report - Non-Alcoholic Beverages - EMEA 2025" report has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.This repo

headline: The secret behind Poppi’s breakout success
summary: Allison and Stephen Ellsworth, Co-Founders of the soda brand Poppi, sit down with Elizabeth Gore to break down how they transformed a farmers' market drink into a multibillion-dollar beverage brand. They share lessons on rebranding, building a digital-first brand during COVID, scaling a startup quickly, and what it’s really like to sell your company to PepsiCo.
